## spec.md

<!-- role: data -->
# Spec

Decompose into phases.


## constraints.md

<!-- role: data -->
# Constraints

- TypeScript strict.


## taste.md

<!-- role: data -->
# Taste

- ESM only.


## Target Model

The builder will use the `opus` model.

## Phase Budget

Stay below ~50,000 output tokens (~$5 USD) per phase — treat it as a hard maximum, not a target. Aim for 50–70% of the ceiling. If a phase would approach or exceed it, split. Splitting is cheap; a too-large phase risks timeout and truncation.

## Output Format

IMPORTANT: Respond with ONLY a JSON object. No prose, no markdown, no commentary. Just the JSON.
